character.name: Sea of Stars modern indie
character.prompt:
Sea of Stars modern indie pixel art style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, slightly taller and slimmer than classic chibi,
large head with big anime-style eyes, clean line work, soft cel-shaded coloring,
long pastel-silver hair flowing past shoulders, sleek hair bangs, head bare,
wearing minimalist white and sky-blue robe with thin gold piping,
streamlined silver chest plate with subtle engraving,
flowing pale blue cloak with smooth gradient draped behind to knees,
hood fabric resting flat at upper back, never on head,
slim wooden staff with bright cyan crystal orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with small pouches,
young woman early 20s, graceful poised stance,
crisp modern pixel art, smooth color gradients, vibrant saturated palette, sharp clean silhouette
